footer.description: DitakNet is a Docker and TrueNAS-ready network visibility, monitoring, discovery, alerting, and IT support platform for local infrastructure.

home.metaDescription: Public website, registration, license request, support, and customer portal for DitakNet.

hero.title: Monitor your local network without constant physical IT visits
hero.subtitle: DitakNet helps businesses see, discover, monitor, and support routers, cameras, NVRs, servers, printers, websites, VLANs, and local devices from one clear portal.

explain.title: Built for local-first monitoring
explain.description: Run DitakNet close to the network you manage. It is useful for small offices, CCTV systems, business networks, and professional IT support teams that need fast visibility without rebuilding infrastructure.

0.title: Automatic discovery
0.description: Scan approved local subnets and quickly identify active IP devices and services.

1.title: Camera and NVR checks
1.description: Track CCTV systems, recorder availability, and network paths.

2.title: Server and website monitoring
2.description: Ping, TCP, HTTP, and agent checks help find outages early.

3.title: Telegram alerts
3.description: Send actionable notifications to the support channel you already use.

4.title: Docker and TrueNAS ready
4.description: Install locally with container workflows and storage-friendly deployment.

5.title: Reports and topology
5.description: Review uptime, service states, and device relationships in one place.

features.title: Everything needed for the first useful monitoring view
features.description: Discovery, checks, alerts, reports, and support workflows are organized around real local operations.

ready.title: Docker and TrueNAS ready
ready.description: DitakNet is designed to run as a local service near your devices. Keep visibility inside the network, reduce remote dependency, and prepare for later license activation.

discovery.title: Automatic discovery
discovery.description: Start with one subnet, then expand to VLANs and client branches when your package allows it.

telegram.title: Telegram alerts
telegram.description: Send critical events to administrators, installers, or support operators with concise context.

faqPreview.title: Questions before installation?
faqPreview.description: Review the common answers about internet access, TrueNAS, activation, cameras, safe scanning, and free limits.

features.title: DitakNet features
features.description: A monitoring platform focused on real local network work: discovery, checks, alerts, reports, topology, and support.

pricing.title: Packages for local networks
pricing.description: Start free, request a Medium license for growing sites, or use Professional for custom limits and multi-branch monitoring.

free.label: Free
free.name: Local Basic
free.description: Good for small offices, home labs, and first installations.

medium.label: Medium
medium.name: Local Pro
medium.description: For business networks that need more visibility and standard support.

professional.label: Professional
professional.name: Local Enterprise
professional.description: Custom limits for multi-branch support teams and managed clients.

about.title: About DitakNet
about.description: DitakNet exists to make local network monitoring practical for installers, support teams, and businesses that need answers quickly.
about.what: It is a local network visibility platform for routers, cameras, NVRs, servers, websites, printers, VLANs, services, licenses, and support workflows.
about.who: It is for small offices, CCTV operators, IT support teams, MSP-style work, and organizations that prefer local visibility.
about.why: The product reduces unnecessary site visits by making the network state visible from one controlled local service.
about.vision: The vision is a reliable local-first monitoring product with clean licensing, practical support, and multi-language customer communication.

contact.title: Contact DitakNet
contact.description: Send a support, license, installation, partnership, or general question. The message is saved for the product owner or admin team.
contact.success: Message received. Support will contact you.

support.title: Support center
support.description: Find installation help, submit a ticket, request a license, or read the documentation.
support.needLogin: Please log in to create and view support tickets.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.description: Guides for installing, activating, and operating DitakNet.
docs.body: This page is ready for detailed product documentation. Use it for step-by-step installation notes, screenshots, troubleshooting, and support references.

0.a: It is a local network monitoring platform for devices, services, alerts, and support workflows.

1.a: Core local monitoring should run inside the network. Internet may be needed for updates, notifications, or license communication.

2.a: Yes, the product is prepared for Docker and TrueNAS-style deployment.

3.a: The Free package includes basic limits for devices, one subnet or VLAN, checks, alerts, reports, and local deployment.

4.a: Medium and Professional packages require a license request and activation process.

5.a: Yes, it can monitor camera and NVR availability through network checks.

6.a: Yes, it supports server checks and agent monitoring in higher packages.

7.a: No. The intended discovery scope is approved local networks and VLANs.

8.a: Discovery should be limited to networks you own or manage and configured with safe local scopes.

9.q: How do I request a license?
9.a: Use the license request form and include your installation ID and package needs.

blog.title: News
blog.description: A ready structure for product updates, release notes, and implementation articles.
blog.placeholderText: Admin-managed blog posts can be added later using the BlogPost model.

auth.registerDescription: Register to request licenses, create support tickets, and track your DitakNet communication.
auth.loginDescription: Access your account, license requests, and support tickets.
auth.emailExists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.forbidden: You do not have access to this resource.

account.title: Account
account.description: Manage your DitakNet profile, licenses, tickets, messages, and next steps.

license.title: Request license activation
license.description: Send your installation ID and package request. This website collects requests; it does not generate final activation codes or expose signing keys.
license.activateInfoDescription: Your request is saved. Support will review it and contact you with the next activation steps.

community.title: Community discussions
community.description: Ask public product questions that can later become documentation or FAQ answers.

admin.title: Admin
admin.description: Manage users, license requests, contact messages, tickets, discussions, and public settings.
admin.settingsText: Basic settings are prepared through environment variables. Editable database-backed settings can be added later.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
